summary: Beta release from stable 25.0.0. CHANGELOG correctly compares with 25.0.0. apiRefLink uses ?view=azure-node-preview (correct for beta). All new operations (IdentityBindings, JWTAuthenticators, MeshMemberships, OperationStatusResult, ContainerService, VmSkus) have proper return types. No _N suffixes, no AutoGenerated, no void for non-delete ops. All Known enum members use PascalCase. CI all passing.
